value:
Thanks for reaching out. I understand how frustrating it is when useful information like update sizes disappears from the interface—that's definitely helpful context for deciding whether to download.

Unfortunately, I don't have visibility into App Store display decisions or version 11.1 specifics from here. What I can tell you is that you can usually check update size by going to your device's Settings > [App Name] > App Size, or by visiting your app's page on the web version of the App Store, which sometimes shows more detailed information than the mobile version.

If you're still not finding the size information you need, I'd recommend reaching out to Apple Support directly, since they manage what appears in the App Store itself. In the meantime, if there's anything else about the app's features or performance I can help with, I'm happy to assist.
